user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=generous, share_min_soc_frac=0.15, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: r4c5 is in imminent critical failure (10% SoC, ~18 min to blackout); r3c5 must attempt emergency micro-shares to prevent total neighborhood collapse, accepting high personal risk..
